name: Shenzhen Yanmade Technology Inc.
summary: Shenzhen Yanmade Technology Inc. engages in the research and development, design, production, and sale of automated and intelligent test equipment. The company offers automated test equipment, test fixtures, accessories, etc. It operates in the United States, Japan, South Korea, Thailand, Philippines, Taiwan, and internationally. The company was founded in 2012 and is based in Shenzhen, China.
